name: Clean, short
input: I need to go to the store and pick up some milk
expected: I need to go to the store and pick up some milk.

name: Light fillers
input: um so I was thinking we could um maybe go to the park
expected: I was thinking we could maybe go to the park.

name: Heavy fillers
input: so like um you know I was uh basically going to like tell him that we need to uh figure this out
expected: I was going to tell him that we need to figure this out.

name: Self-correction
input: send it to the team on Tuesday sorry I mean Wednesday morning
expected: Send it to the team on Wednesday morning.

name: Multiple self-corrections
input: we need to update the app not the app I mean the website or rather the landing page before Friday
expected: We need to update the landing page before Friday.

name: Repetition/stutter
input: I want to I want to make sure that the the project is is done by next week
expected: I want to make sure that the project is done by next week.

name: Spoken formatting
input: send an email to john at example dot com and tell him the meeting is at three thirty PM new paragraph also remind him to bring the quarterly report
expected:
Send an email to john@example.com and tell him the meeting is at 3:30 PM.

Also remind him to bring the quarterly report.

name: List dictation
input: the agenda items are first budget review second hiring update third product roadmap and fourth customer feedback
expected:
The agenda items are:
1. Budget review
2. Hiring update
3. Product roadmap
4. Customer feedback

name: Long rambling
input: so basically what I'm trying to say is um you know the thing with the project is that we we really need to like focus on the um the core features right and not get distracted by all the other stuff that people are asking for I mean some of it is important but like we can't do everything at once
expected: The thing with the project is that we really need to focus on the core features and not get distracted by all the other stuff that people are asking for. Some of it is important, but we can't do everything at once.

name: Already clean
input: The quarterly earnings report shows a 15% increase in revenue compared to last year.
expected: The quarterly earnings report shows a 15% increase in revenue compared to last year.
